evidence_contract.baseline: Phase 2 bootstrap smoke, Phase 4 OT LEDH smoke, P8d five-seed value contract, and within-P8j adjacent-rung comparisons.
evidence_contract.primary_criterion: Select the smallest count per algorithm passing five-seed finite, MC SE, runtime, adjacent-rung stability, and route/transport gates; otherwise emit a blocker.
evidence_contract.question: What particle count, if any, is adequate for SIR d18 bootstrap and OT-resampled LEDH DPF value evidence?

nonclaims: P8j SIR d18 particle-count tuning gate only

run_manifest.environment: TensorFlow/TensorFlow Probability P8J_PHASE5C_SCALE_ADAPTIVE_SINKHORN_REPAIR SIR particle tuning harness

nonclaims: blocked SIR d18 tuning result, not selected particle-count evidence
selected_blocked.selection_rule: no evaluated P8j SIR count passed all gates
